# meraki_network_firmware_upgrades_data (Data Source)

This data source can read the `Network Firmware Upgrades Data` configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "meraki_network_firmware_upgrades_data" "example" {
  network_id = "L_123456"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `network_id` (String) Network ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `products_appliance_available_versions` (Attributes List) Firmware versions available for upgrade (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products_appliance_available_versions))
- `products_appliance_current_version_firmware` (String) Name of the firmware version
- `products_appliance_current_version_id` (String) Firmware version identifier
- `products_appliance_current_version_release_date` (String) Release date of the firmware version
- `products_appliance_current_version_release_type` (String) Release type of the firmware version
- `products_appliance_current_version_short_name` (String) Firmware version short name
- `products_appliance_is_upgrade_available` (Boolean) Whether or not an upgraded firmware version is available
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_from_version_firmware` (String) Name of the firmware version
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_from_version_id` (String) Firmware version identifier
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_from_version_release_date` (String) Release date of the firmware version
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_from_version_release_type` (String) Release type of the firmware version
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_from_version_short_name` (String) Firmware version short name
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_time` (String) Timestamp of the last successful firmware upgrade
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_to_version_firmware` (String) Name of the firmware version
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_to_version_id` (String) Firmware version identifier
- `products_appliance_last_upgrade_to_version_release_date` (String) Release date of the firmware version
